g.text: This problem can be solved without AI using career counselors, teachers,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: and aptitude tests.However, AI can make the process faster and more

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: personalized. It can analyze a student's skills, interests, and academic

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
